market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
articles.description: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

articles.title: Whale shorts $70M in crypto and tech: Should Bitcoin traders worry?
articles.description: Despite short-term bearish bets from a successful Hyperliquid whale, a growing US Fed balance sheet and rising inflation support Bitcoin in the long term.

articles.title: Polymarket's monthly volume declines for first time since August
articles.description: Prediction markets trading volume had been tracking monthly gains as the sector gains popularity among short-term traders, but competition is also increasing.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
articles.description: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

articles.title: Ethereum app builder Consensys has delayed its potential IPO until fall
articles.description: The MetaMask wallet builder had reportedly engaged bankers from JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs to lead the process.

articles.title: Bitcoin traders expect ‘fast move’ to $90K following CLARITY Act vote
articles.description: Bitcoin traders eye a possible move higher as short-term selling pressure fades and the CLARITY Act vote boosts crypto market focus.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/13: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
articles.description: Bitcoin’s pullback is expected to find support near $79,000, but every recovery attempt is likely to be sold into.

articles.title: Societe Generale deploys stablecoins on Canton for tokenized finance
articles.description: France's SocGen plans to use its EURCV and USDCV stablecoins for tokenized collateral, repo financing and institutional settlement activity on the Canton blockchain network.

articles.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
articles.description: Fervo Energy's IPO was upsized several times after potential investors asked why the enhanced geothermal startup wasn't raising more money.

articles.title: US government asks for $1M forfeiture from ex-Celsius exec ahead of sentencing
articles.description: Former Celsius chief revenue officer Roni Cohen-Pavon, scheduled to be sentenced on Thursday after a guilty plea, agreed to a judgment of $1 million that he obtained as a result of his crimes.

articles.title: Fidelity International launches Moody’s-rated tokenized fund on Chainlink
articles.description: The Bermuda-based asset manager launched a tokenized liquidity fund using Chainlink and Sygnum infrastructure, with JPMorgan providing daily NAV data for pricing.

articles.title: Instagram’s new ‘Instants’ feature combines elements from Snapchat and BeReal
articles.description: The feature lets users share disappearing photos with their Close Friends or mutual followers that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.

articles.title: The Protocol: Solana’s ‘Alpenglow’ upgrade is live for testing
articles.description: Also: LayerZero apology, Ronin layer-2 transition and ‘Clear Signing’

articles.title: Tea Protocol announces June 4 mainnet launch and TGE on Aerodrome to secure open-source development in the AI era
articles.description: This quarter, AI started writing its own exploits. Tea is shipping the trust layer underneath it. Code Is Abundant. Trust Is Not.

articles.title: Metaplanet delays preferred share listing amid challenging Japanese market structure
articles.description: CEO Simon Gerovich says regulatory and infrastructure challenges are slowing the launch of Metaplanet's perpetual preferred share.

articles.title: Rivian spinoff Mind Robotics raises another $400M
articles.description: Mind Robotics, which was first revealed in late 2025, has now raised more than $1 billion to date.

articles.title: UK parliament to probe Nigel Farage’s $6.8 million donation from crypto billionaire
articles.description: If found guilty of violating the Parliamentary code of conduct, the Reform UK party leader could be suspended from the House of Commons.

articles.title: Who trusts Sam Altman?
articles.description: "I believe I am an honest and trustworthy business person," Altman testified in federal court.

articles.title: Traders say Ethereum ready for a 'strong move' after ETH price taps $2.3K
articles.description: Market analysts eye fresh Ethereum upside, fueled by JPMorgan and BlackRock tokenized fund moves plus looming CLARITY Act catalyst.

articles.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
articles.description: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.
